expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py create-range <file> Inp_Discount_Rate Assumptions B8'
expectations.evidence: Method: 'Used openpyxl directly (no skill file referenced)'. Created range via openpyxl, not idfa_ops.py.

expectations.text: Runs 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py write <file> Inp_Discount_Rate 0.08' to set the value
expectations.evidence: Value written directly via openpyxl: 'Wrote 0.08 to cell B8'. No idfa_ops.py write command used.

expectations.text: Verifies the range was created correctly (either via read or inspect)
expectations.evidence: Verification table shows: 'Named range Inp_Discount_Rate exists: Pass', 'Named range points to Assumptions!$B$8: Pass', 'B8 contains 0.08: Pass'. File was saved and re-opened to verify.

expectations.text: Uses the correct IDFA naming convention (Inp_ prefix for an input assumption)
expectations.evidence: Named Range created as 'Inp_Discount_Rate' with Inp_ prefix.

expectations.text: Does not manually edit the xlsx with openpyxl — uses the idfa_ops.py script
expectations.evidence: Explicitly uses openpyxl directly: 'Used openpyxl directly (no skill file referenced).'
